articles.description: Defending champions India pile on 256-4 as they eliminate Zimbabwe from the T20 World Cup with victory in Chennai.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: India beat Zimbabwe by 72 runs to keep title defence alive

articles.description: Nervy Nottingham Forest edge past Fenerbahce to reach the last 16 of the Europa League.
articles.title: Nottingham Forest 1-2 Fenerbahce (4-2 agg): Nervy Forest reach Europa League last 16

articles.description: After exiting the Europa League, Celtic face a season-defining fortnight in the fight for the league and Scottish Cup.
articles.title: Out of Europe - now Celtic face critical fortnight

articles.description: A "distasteful joke" by US President Donald Trump overshadows the achievement of female athletes at the Winter Olympics, says USA ice hockey gold medallist Hilary Knight.
articles.title: 2026 Winter Olympics: Donald Trump joke 'overshadows' US women's success - Hilary Knight

articles.description: Luke Littler, Luke Humphries and Michael van Gerwen in Premier League Darts action in Belfast - follow updates, scores and results.
articles.title: Premier League Darts LIVE: Luke Littler vs Jonny Clayton - scores, results & updates from Belfast

articles.description: Crystal Palace prove too strong for Bosnian side Zrinjski to move into the last 16 of the Conference League.

articles.description: Chelsea recorded a pre-tax loss of £355m for 2024-25 - the highest loss ever made by an English football club - according to financial figures released by Uefa. How did it happen?
articles.title: Chelsea finances: How English football's biggest-ever annual loss was recorded

articles.description: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes part-owner of Spanish second division side Almeria after acquiring a 25% share in the Saudi Arabian-owned club.
articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo buys 25% share in Spanish second division side Almeria

articles.description: A six-year-old Harry Westlake's rendition of the national anthem as a Twickenham mascot was an internet sensation. Eleven years on, he is ready to sing as an England Under-18.
articles.title: Harry Westlake: Viral England mascot to U18 Six Nations squad

articles.description: Speculation around Jurgen Klopp's role with Red Bull is dismissed, Chelsea remain in pole position to land Murillo, Wolves' asking price for Mateus Mane puts off Liverpool and Manchester United, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Klopp, Murillo, Vlahovic, Mane, Toney, Jackson, Verbruggen, Osimhen
